title: rubus × inferax
intro: Rubus × inferax, a hybrid species of raspberry, is a unique and versatile plant known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The leaves and roots of Rubus × inferax contain anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and other bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. These compounds have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, arthritis, and skin conditions, and are also believed to have anti-cancer and cardiovascular-protective effects. Rubus × inferax is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be consumed as a raw leafy green or dried as a herbal supplement.
